title: SV: $typename not supported?
body:
I get below error with $typename

```log
vvp -l go2uvm_run.log vw_ivl_go2uvm.vvp
../ivl_typename_i413.sv:8: Error: System task/function $typename() is not defined by any module.
```

Code
```verilog
module ivl_uvm_mbx;

  int my_q[$];

  initial begin
    #1;
    $display ("Type: ", $typename(my_q));
  end

endmodule : ivl_uvm_mbx 

```
code_blocks:
vvp -l go2uvm_run.log vw_ivl_go2uvm.vvp
../ivl_typename_i413.sv:8: Error: System task/function $typename() is not defined by any module.
